calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Don Pham-Huy, Esq. of the Moore Law Group, 714.431.2000, for the Plaintiff;
Ramon Gonzalez, Jr., 415.373.8060, Defendant and Self-Represented Litigant.

DEFENDANT RAMON GONZALEZ JR.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Matter called. ARGUMENT is held. At the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

After the hearing, the Court signed the order denying Defendant Ramon Gonzalez Jr.'s motion to set aside default and default judgment. (see the order filed this date for the Court's complete ruling)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-16-2021 Continued To Apr-23-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Ramon Gonzalez, Jr., Plaintiff in pro per;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

DEFENDANT RAMON GONZALEZ JR.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

Matter called. Brief dicussions are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Court continued the matter to April 23, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. The clerk is to provide notice to Discover Bank.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: (Via ZOOM Videoconference):
Atty. Don Phan-Huy, Esq., of The Moore Law Group APC, 800-506-2652, for Plaintiff;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

DEFENDANT RAMON GONZALEZ JR.'s Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

No argument is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Ramon Gonzalez Jr.'s motion to set aside default and default judgment is denied as untimely under CCP 1005. Defendant may re-file the motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-19-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM Video-conferencing:

Self-Represented defendant/moving party, Ramon Gonzales (Tel: 415-373-8060) appears on his own behalf.

No other appearance made in this matter.

On calendar:
DEFENDANT RAMON GONZALEZ JR. MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

The motion of Defendant Ramon Gonzalez Jr., to set aside default and default judgment is off calendar. Defendant did not file proof of service of the motion on Plaintiff's counsel of record at least 5 court days before the hearing, as required by Rule of Court 3.1300(c).) Proof of service on Plaintiff through CT Corporation is insufficient.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter:proceeding not reported.
